chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I book a meeting room at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は職場で会議室をどう予約するかについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually book a room when my team needs to plan a new project.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい、チームが新しいプロジェクトを計画するときに部屋を予約します。

chunks.en: First I check the time and how many people will join the meeting.
chunks.ja: まず私は時間と、何人が会議に参加するかを確認します。

chunks.en: When the room is already taken, I look for another free room nearby.
chunks.ja: 部屋がもう埋まっているときは、近くの別の空いている部屋を探します。

chunks.en: I always check small things, like the size and if there's a screen.
chunks.ja: 私はいつも、広さや画面があるかどうかなど、小さなことを確認します。

chunks.en: So booking a room is easy for me when I plan a few steps ahead.
chunks.ja: だから数手先を計画しておけば、私にとって部屋の予約は簡単です。

outline: Opening: how I book a meeting room
Point 1: when I need it and who joins
Point 2: what I check and backup plans
Wrap-up: planning ahead makes it easy

modelTalk.text: I book a meeting room almost every week at work. First, I open our office app on my computer. I choose a day and a time. Then I pick a room that is free. I usually need a room for our team meeting. About five people join, so the room can't be too small. I always check the start time and the end time. I also check how many chairs the room has. Sometimes the room I want is already taken. When that happens, I look for another free room. If I can't find one, I move my meeting to a later time. I like a room with a big screen too. Before the meeting, I send a message to everyone. I tell them the room number and the time. It's easy when I plan it early.

chunks.en: The way I usually book a room is through our shared online calendar.
chunks.ja: 私がいつも部屋を予約する方法は、共有のオンラインカレンダーを使うことです。

chunks.en: I usually need a room when my team has our weekly planning meeting.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい、チームの週次の計画ミーティングがあるときに部屋が必要になります。

chunks.en: When the room is already taken, I just move our meeting to a later time.
chunks.ja: 部屋がもう埋まっているときは、ミーティングを後の時間に移すだけです。

chunks.en: One small thing I always check is whether the room is big enough for everyone.
chunks.ja: 私がいつも確認する小さなことの一つは、部屋が全員に十分な広さかどうかです。

chunks.en: So booking a room is easy for me once I check the time and size.
chunks.ja: だから時間と広ささえ確認すれば、部屋の予約は私にとって簡単です。

outline: Opening: how I book a room online
Point 1: when I need it and who joins
Point 2: what I do when it's taken
Wrap-up: small checks like time and size

modelTalk.text: I usually book a meeting room online. We've got a simple app for that. I open it, pick a time, and grab a free room. Most of the time I need a room in the afternoon. My small team joins, so about four or five people. Sometimes my manager comes too, and one client. When I plan, I check the time first. I don't want to clash with another meeting. I also check the size. A big group needs a bigger room. Then I look at the screen and the wifi. If the room is already taken, I don't panic. I just pick the next free slot, or I find another floor. Plus I can ask a colleague to swap. That's it, really. It's quick, and it keeps everyone happy. I always send an invite after I book.
